description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a landscaped rectangular plot, featuring a single-story structure with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The property includes a driveway leading to a carport or garage, a paved walkway, and a series of evenly spaced trees and shrubs along the perimeter. The front yard is adorned with two rectangular water features and a manicured lawn, while the backyard offers a shaded patio area with pergola and outdoor seating. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor living spaces to the outdoor areas. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and minimalist landscaping.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped yard, driveway, and outdoor patio with pergola.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, walkway, water features, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport/garage, patio with pergola, and the open backyard area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, shaded seating area, and the back entrance to the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
